query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "ace-ego-0: unifying egocentric human and robotic data for vla pretrain" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same domain (Vision-Language-Action models for robotics) and proposes a specific architectural mechanism (Action Chain-of-Thought) that represents a canonical alternative approach to the "unifying" strategy mentioned in the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (d) for foundational methodology in the VLA space.
